message:
chore(artifacts): update beads issue tracker and verification evidence metadata

- Refresh .beads/issues.jsonl with current issue state
- Update verification_evidence.json for beads bd-1p2b, bd-3ua7, bd-b44,
  bd-y7lu (section 10.13) and bd-12q (section 10.4) to reflect latest
  evidence collection passes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
